description: 6xHis (hexahistidine) polyhistidine affinity tag — a canonical 6-aa IMAC purification tag (HHHHHH).

references.authors: Hochuli E, Döbeli H, Schacher A
references.title: New metal chelate adsorbent selective for proteins and peptides containing neighbouring histidine residues

references.authors: Hochuli E, Bannwarth W, Döbeli H, Gentz R, Stüber D
references.title: Genetic Approach to Facilitate Purification of Recombinant Proteins with a Novel Metal Chelate Adsorbent
Overview of tag protein fusions: from molecular and biochemical fundamentals to commercial systems

references.authors: Kimple ME, Brill AL, Pasker RL
references.title: Overview of affinity tags for protein purification

references.authors: Kaufmann M, Lindner P, Honegger A, Blank K, Tschopp M, Capitani G, Plückthun A, Grütter MG
references.title: Crystal structure of the anti-His tag antibody 3D5 single-chain fragment complexed to its antigen

label: 6xHis
note: Canonical hexahistidine (polyhistidine) affinity tag, HHHHHH. Synthetic 6-aa peptide that binds immobilized divalent transition-metal ions (Ni2+, Co2+, Cu2+, Zn2+) for immobilized-metal affinity chromatography (IMAC). Atomic part: the 6 residues are the functional unit and carry no internal functional sub-elements.

provenance.sequence_source: PDB 1KTR Chain B (Kaufmann et al., J.Mol.Biol. 2002, PMID 12054774), "Oligohistidine peptide Antigen", synthetic construct (taxon:32630), sequence HHHHHH, identity 100% over 6 aa; independently fetched via RCSB FASTA API and compared byte-for-byte to the stored sequence.

functional_claims.label: Adjacent histidine residues chelate immobilized divalent transition-metal ions (Ni2+, Co2+, Cu2+, Zn2+) on an IMAC matrix, enabling single-step affinity purification; protein is eluted by imidazole competition or low pH.

source.quote: metal chelate adsorbent selective for proteins and peptides containing neighbouring histidine residues

functional_claims.label: Genetic fusion of the polyhistidine peptide to a recombinant protein permits one-step IMAC purification of the fusion product.

source.quote: Genetic Approach to Facilitate Purification of Recombinant Proteins with a Novel Metal Chelate Adsorbent

functional_claims.label: Host- and organism-agnostic: as a small synthetic peptide the tag functions across expression hosts and works under both native and denaturing (e.g. 6–8 M urea / guanidine) conditions.

source.quote: the His-tag ... small size, works under denaturing conditions, low cost

functional_claims.label: Common length variants of the polyhistidine tag exist (e.g. 8xHis, 10xHis); the 6xHis form (HHHHHH) is the canonical minimal tag.

source.quote: 6xHis tag ... metal ion choices (Ni2+, Co2+, Cu2+, Zn2+), matrix types (NTA vs IDA), placement
